BugInstance.message: This use of org/slf4j/Logger.error(Ljava/lang/String;Ljava/lang/Object;)V might be used to include CRLF characters into log messages
Empty database password in com.vanitystore.config.Conexion.getConexion()
Hard coded password found
Dead store to controlador in com.vanitystore.config.Principal.main(String[])
new com.vanitystore.controller.AuditoriaController(FrmAuditoria, ConsultaDAO) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into AuditoriaController.vista
Dead store to ctrlAuditoria in com.vanitystore.controller.DashboardController.actionPerformed(ActionEvent)
Dead store to ctrlGestion in com.vanitystore.controller.DashboardController.actionPerformed(ActionEvent)
Dead store to daoGestion in com.vanitystore.controller.DashboardController.actionPerformed(ActionEvent)
new com.vanitystore.controller.DashboardController(FrmDashboard, PrendaDAO) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into DashboardController.vista
Overridable method addActionListener is called from constructor new com.vanitystore.controller.DashboardController(FrmDashboard, PrendaDAO).
Do not catch NullPointerException like in com.vanitystore.controller.GestionPrendaController.guardarNuevaPrenda()
new com.vanitystore.controller.GestionPrendaController(FrmGestionPrenda) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into GestionPrendaController.vista
Overridable method addActionListener is called from constructor new com.vanitystore.controller.GestionPrendaController(FrmGestionPrenda).
Dead store to dashboardCtrl in com.vanitystore.controller.LoginController.actionPerformed(ActionEvent)
new com.vanitystore.controller.LoginController(FrmLogin, UsuarioDAO) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into LoginController.vista
Improper handling of Unicode transformations such as case mapping and normalization.
Overridable method addActionListener is called from constructor new com.vanitystore.controller.LoginController(FrmLogin, UsuarioDAO).
new com.vanitystore.controller.StockController(FrmStock, StockDAO) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into StockController.vista
com.vanitystore.model.Consulta.getMomento() may expose internal representation by returning Consulta.momento
new com.vanitystore.model.Consulta(int, int, int, Timestamp) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into Consulta.momento
com.vanitystore.model.Consulta.setMomento(Timestamp) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into Consulta.momento

com.vanitystore.view.FrmAuditoria.getTblAuditoria() may expose internal representation by returning FrmAuditoria.tblAuditoria
Overridable method getContentPane is called from constructor new com.vanitystore.view.FrmAuditoria().
Overridable method pack is called from constructor new com.vanitystore.view.FrmAuditoria().
com.vanitystore.view.FrmDashboard.getUsuarioLogueado() may expose internal representation by returning FrmDashboard.usuarioLogueado

Improper handling of Unicode transformations such as case mapping and normalization.
Overridable method getContentPane is called from constructor new com.vanitystore.view.FrmDashboard().
Overridable method pack is called from constructor new com.vanitystore.view.FrmDashboard().
Primitive field com.vanitystore.view.FrmDashboard.btnAgregarPrenda is public and set from inside the class, which makes it too exposed. Consider making it private to limit external accessibility.
Primitive field com.vanitystore.view.FrmDashboard.btnCerrarSesion is public and set from inside the class, which makes it too exposed. Consider making it private to limit external accessibility.
Primitive field com.vanitystore.view.FrmDashboard.btnPanelAdmin is public and set from inside the class, which makes it too exposed. Consider making it private to limit external accessibility.

Primitive field com.vanitystore.view.FrmDashboard.txtBuscador is public and set from inside the class, which makes it too exposed. Consider making it private to limit external accessibility.
Class com.vanitystore.view.FrmDashboard defines non-transient non-serializable instance field usuarioLogueado
